title: UFC Is Fighting on the White House Lawn. A Lawsuit Just Tried to Stop It.
script: A pro MMA fight card just got booked on the White House South Lawn. UFC Freedom 250 — scheduled for Flag Day, June 14 — was approved for the grounds to mark Trump's 80th birthday and America's 250th anniversary. Then a federal lawsuit dropped, arguing it violates National Park Service rules and never had an environmental review. The White House called it 'obstructionist.' The fighters are still warming up.
